Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Well, I realized it's a full moon tonight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}You did too, huh? Oh god, I'm turning into a workaholic![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}We're not certain of anything yet, but... we can't find Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}At one point, I was able to sense a Persona, but I lost Aigis right after that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}You sensed a Persona? Could it have been Strega?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Well, she hasn't detected any of them, but we can't be positive.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}All right, call the others. Let's see what's going on over there.[n]{f 1 1}
